analysis.executive_summary: The assessment identified 2 findings across 1 vulnerability categories. The overall risk is rated Low. Immediate remediation is required for critical and high severity issues.

findings_analysis.attack_scenario: Attacker exploits SQLMap SQL Injection at http://testhtml5.vulnweb.com/#/popular/login using payload: POST username/password
findings_analysis.business_impact: Potential data breach, system compromise, and reputational damage.
remediation: Use parameterised queries or prepared statements
Use an ORM with built-in sanitisation
Implement WAF rules for SQLi patterns

top_priorities: Immediately fix SQL injection and command injection vulnerabilities
Sanitise all output to prevent XSS attacks
Implement proper authentication controls and hashing

findings.evidence: sqlmap binary not found in container
sqlmap binary not found in container
